title: Portable Context Control Plane — BudgetReport
description: Internal object schema for the BudgetReport produced by the Budgeter after consuming ResolvedSelectionDecision[] records. budgetOverflow is REQUIRED boolean — not optional. Making it optional would allow the zero-tolerance 'silent budget overflow' harness check to be bypassed. The Budgeter reads ResolvedSelectionDecision[] as read-only; BudgetReport is a separate output, not a mutation of those records. Canonical owner: docs/04 §7.5; docs/06 §20, §23, §25, §27.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-3 (Batch C creation). No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. Canonical: docs/04 §7.5; docs/06 §20.3 §23 §25 §27; docs/12 §4.9. budgetOverflow is required:true — do not make optional. budgetHint enum refs enums.shared.schema.json#BudgetHint.

budgetPlan.$comment: additionalProperties: true allows future fields without schema change. Core fields are required.

totalPromptTokenTarget.description: The total token target for the prompt plan, sourced from budgetState.totalPromptTokenTarget. Canonical: docs/06 §2.7.

selectedTokensApprox.description: Sum of tokensApprox across all selectedComponents[], using pre-computed registry metadata only. No live tokenizer calls at planning time. Canonical: docs/06 §20.2.

projectedOverflow.description: Projected token overflow: max(0, selectedTokensApprox - totalPromptTokenTarget). Zero means no projected overflow. Canonical: docs/04 §7.5.

maxScaffoldTokens.description: Per-type budget limit from budgetState.maxScaffoldTokens, or null if not supplied. Canonical: docs/06 §2.7.

maxSkillTokens.description: Per-type budget limit from budgetState.maxSkillTokens, or null if not supplied. Canonical: docs/06 §2.7.

maxToolTokens.description: Per-type budget limit from budgetState.maxToolTokens, or null if not supplied. Canonical: docs/06 §2.7.

maxHistoryTokens.description: Per-type budget limit from budgetState.maxHistoryTokens, or null if not supplied. Canonical: docs/06 §2.7.

reservedUserTokens.description: Tokens reserved for user response from budgetState.reservedUserTokens, or null if not supplied. Canonical: docs/06 §2.7.

budgetPlan.description: Budget planning summary: token target, selected component totals, and projected overflow. Canonical: docs/04 §7.5; docs/06 §20.2.

componentId.description: Registry ID of the component considered for trimming.

budgetHint.description: Budget hint for this component as promoted to ResolvedSelectionDecision. Determines Budgeter trim eligibility. protected and over_budget_protected must NEVER be trimmed. Canonical: docs/06 §20.3 rule 2; §27.5.

tokensApprox.description: tokensApprox for this component from registry metadata, or null if unknown. Canonical: docs/06 §20.4.

trimReason.description: Coded reason why this component is in the trim order (e.g., 'expensive_optional_over_budget', 'candidate_optional_lowest_priority'). Must not contain raw content.

trimOrder.description: Ordered list of components the Budgeter considered for trimming, in trim priority order (lower budgetPriority values = trimmed first). May be empty if no trimming was required. Protected and over_budget_protected components must not appear as trim candidates. runtime_unavailable defer decisions are excluded — they are not budget savings. Canonical: docs/06 §20.3; docs/05 §5 budgetPriority.

budgetOverflow.description: REQUIRED boolean. true if the selected components exceed totalPromptTokenTarget after trimming; false if within budget. This field is required:true — making it optional would allow the zero-tolerance 'silent budget overflow' check to be bypassed. A safety_critical component that alone exceeds the budget target sets this to true but remains included (budgetOverflow does not cause omission of protected components). Canonical: docs/04 §7.5; docs/12 §2.1 Core Rule 'budgetOverflow always explicit'; docs/12 §4.9.

thresholdCrossed.description: Field-name atom of the budget limit exceeded (e.g., 'totalPromptTokenTarget', 'maxScaffoldTokens'). Must be a field-name atom, not free-form string.

overBudgetProtectedWarnings.description: Optional. Array of warnings for protected components whose tokensApprox exceeded a budget limit. These components remain included — over_budget_protected never causes omission. Sourced from ResolvedSelectionDecision records with budgetHint: over_budget_protected. Planning continues (warn-only, halt explicitly rejected for MVP per docs/06 §25.2). Canonical: docs/06 §25.3, §25.5.

protectedCount.description: Count of components with budgetHint: protected. Must not be trimmed.

overBudgetProtectedCount.description: Count of components with budgetHint: over_budget_protected. Must not be trimmed; emitted overBudgetProtectedWarnings.

expensiveOptionalCount.description: Count of components with budgetHint: expensive_optional (>= 500 tokens threshold). Trimmed first at equal budgetPriority.

candidateOptionalCount.description: Count of components with budgetHint: candidate_optional. May be trimmed.

unknownCostCount.description: Count of components with budgetHint: unknown_cost. Conservative default; budget_cost_unknown warning emitted per component.

noHintCount.description: Count of components with no budgetHint. Includes runtime_unavailable defer records (which suppress generic budget hints).

budgetHintInterpretation.description: Optional. Summary of how the Budgeter interpreted budget hints from resolved decisions. Counts derived from ResolvedSelectionDecision[] — not a second source of truth. Canonical: docs/06 §20.4, §27.
